creator: gslin@gslin.org
text:
Thanks,

Please commit it.

On Sat, Oct 25, 2008 at 04:30:30PM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of security/p5-Net-SAML,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/128372 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/128372
> 
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
